epics.name: Platform Modernization Epic
epics.objective: Modernize legacy systems and enhance platform capabilities
epics.scope: Website migration, 50Above50 improvements, CRM integration, API enhancements
epics.keyDeliverables: 29 pages migrated, subscription launch, security hardening
epics.successMetrics: Page speed improvement 40%, revenue growth, security compliance 95%+

epics.name: Analytics & Intelligence Epic
epics.objective: Build comprehensive data foundation and AI capabilities
epics.scope: CDP development, analytics dashboards, AI agents, recommendation engines
epics.keyDeliverables: Gold Tier analytics, sales AI agents, ML recommendations
epics.successMetrics: Data-driven decisions 80%+, AI conversion 15%+, recommendation accuracy 85%+

epics.name: Infrastructure Optimization Epic
epics.objective: Optimize cloud infrastructure and enhance security posture
epics.scope: AWS to GCP migration, cost optimization, monitoring setup
epics.keyDeliverables: Cost reduction 30%, improved monitoring, security compliance
epics.successMetrics: Infrastructure cost savings 30%+, system uptime 99.9%+, security response < 1hr

update: pushed on dev and shared the reference file to reefaq for testing journey based on the above implemented event.

Capturing all membership status updates (e.g., initiated, charged, started, cancelled, expired) and sending them to Pulse via Razorpay webhook triggers.
items.usecase: Provides complete visibility of the user membership lifecycle for better tracking, automation, and engagement.
acceptanceCriteria: Events are sent to Pulse reliably

items.note: It took 1.30 hr. I started on 10.40 AM.
Track consecutive user activity (like attending events, completing tasks, or participating in sessions) to encourage engagement and reward consistency.
items.usecase: 1. Track daily/weekly participation of users in events or platform activities.2. Increment streak count when user performs the required action consecutively.3. Show streaks on user dashboard to motivate engagement.4. Optionally, provide rewards or badges for achieving streak milestones.5. Reset streak if the user misses a day/session.

items.text: Support for app-code authentication in API
items.note: Allow users to authenticate via a temporary app-generated code or QR code instead of OTP or password. This will enable seamless login and joining of events via the Web Zoom SDK.
items.usecase: 1. User generates a temporary app code from the mobile app.2. User submits the app code to the API endpoint.3. API validates the code and issues a short-lived JWT token.

items.note: Planning the move into the app journey.
items.usecase: Gives users a smoother app experience.

items.text: Events listing and joining via Web Zoom SDK
items.note: Allow users to join Zoom events directly from the website without OTP login. Authentication is done via a secure app-generated code or QR code scan.
items.usecase: 1. Display upcoming events on the website.2. User selects an event to join.3. System generates a unique session token (JWT) for the user.4. Token can be retrieved via scanning QR code or app code.

items.text: Fix Journey first node identification flag
items.note:
- Validate that exactly one node has fromTriggerNode: true before a journey can be saved/published in the journey builder
- Show an error/warning to the user if no entry point is set — block saving until it's fixed
items.usecase: Show an error/warning to the user if no entry point is set — block saving until it's fixed
acceptanceCriteria: Validation prevents saving without entry node

items.text: Sales Agent – Specific Tours Pilot launch testing, stakeholder alignment
items.note: Preparing for internal pilot testing by aligning stakeholders and refining prompts, responses, and data based on initial feedback.
items.usecase: Ensures the system is validated internally before full rollout.

items.note: Finalizing conversation scripts including sales pitch, closure, and intent/ratings handling.
items.usecase: Improves quality of conversations and increases chances of successful conversions.

items.text: Plivo setup for India & recording feasibility
items.note: Setting up Plivo for Indian numbers and checking recording support and associated costs. Manual recording remains a fallback option.
items.usecase: Enables scalable calling infrastructure for India with clarity on recording capabilities.

items.note: Exploring call recording setup with Plivo, including feasibility and cost. Manual recording is possible but requires additional effort.
items.usecase: Helps review calls, improve quality, and maintain records for training and compliance.

items.note: Preparing important data features.
items.usecase: Supports better analytics and predictions.

items.usecase: Helps track performance clearly.

items.note: Publishing user-facing dashboards with key metrics and insights.
items.usecase: Makes data-driven insights easily accessible for teams to monitor performance and make informed decisions.

items.note: Building and finalizing ~50 ML features including propensity, time-series, standard deviation, and averages.
items.usecase: Improves model accuracy and strength of recommendations.

items.note: Integrating long-term and contextual memory using Mem0 and Neo4j.
items.usecase: Enables deeper personalization based on user memory and behavior.

items.note: Building recommendation models using historical (cold) data.
items.usecase: Predicts user needs and preferences proactively.

items.note: Developing real-time recommendations based on live (hot) data.
items.usecase: Delivers real-time, context-aware recommendations to improve engagement.
